description: This is an HTML source file that defines the structure, style, and client-side logic for a web-based database viewer interface. It includes HTML markup, CSS styles, and JavaScript code for interacting with a backend API to list databases, tables, and display table data.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches and displays the list of available databases.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the database list by reloading databases from the API.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses the database's table list.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and displays data for a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Renders the data table HTML structure with provided data.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Generates HTML for individual table cell based on data type and size.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content to show full data.
